name: audit-coherence
description: Declared-vs-real consistency audit (read-only): cron field validity, repo↔deployed source drift, brain model freeze, patrol freshness. The vaccine against the drift disease — what a component SAYS it is vs what it DOES. Agent-agnostic (relative paths + $GALAHAD_HOME).

steps.run: for f in $(ls src 2>/dev/null); do diff -q /opt/claude-bridge/workspace/galahad/engine/src/$f src/$f >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "$f"; done
find "$GALAHAD_HOME/memory/ETAT_DU_MONDE.md" -mmin -180 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo fresh || echo STALE_or_missing
